name: Franchise Architect: Football
currentFocus: Session 47 shipped save-scoped Priority Inbox persistence, Tactical Film Room receipts, executable General Manager decisions with commitment tracking, checkpoint-aware Fast Sim, truthful audit/startup renderers, and a runtime-switch stale-save guard.
nextMilestone: Obtain a real received-message receipt proving football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwards/copies to Studio operations, then verify current live origin/routing for playfranchisearchitect.com after deployment before any SPARKED flip.
blockers: Launch/SPARKED remains evidence-gated until football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying is verified with a real received-message receipt and current live origin/routing proves playfranchisearchitect.com serves the latest build.

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Session 47 verified final code tree with direct canonical shards 337/337 (core 64/64, runtime 162/162, sim-contract 67/67, sim-realism 1/1, studio 43/43), focused consequence/checkpoint tests 10/10, Playwright UI 18/18, Pages build/smoke, syntax/integrity sweeps, and doctor blockingFailing 0.
testSuiteStatus.uiSuiteNote: Session 47 direct Playwright passed 18/18 after adding a deterministic stale-save guard for runtime switching.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

timedOut: Aggregate npm test wrapper was terminated after five silent minutes; all direct canonical shards subsequently passed 337/337.
passed: changed/untracked JSON and NDJSON integrity sweep

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
